qualitative_claim: At a meaningful edge, very low volume at the bar extreme is a reversal trigger only after bar close.
bullish_rule: Low/swing low/LOD/support with low_volume_at_low and confirmed bar close; trigger long only if next bar trades up or close rejects low.
bearish_rule: High/swing high/HOD/resistance with low_volume_at_high and confirmed bar close; trigger short only if next bar trades down or close rejects high.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint volume at price; session levels; swing levels
feature_columns_needed: low_volume_at_low; low_volume_at_high; swing_extreme_rank; session_extreme_flag; level_type; bar_closed; next_bar_trigger; stop_distance_ticks
candidate_thresholds: Default only: swing_lookback=25, edge_volume_limit=10; test percentile edge volume and market-specific grids.
confirmation_rule: Confirmed bar close plus next-bar directional trade or rejection close.
invalidation_rule: Signal extreme plus buffer breached; acceptance beyond edge; no response timeout.
expected_edge: Strong: compact structural stop and immediate rejection from edge.

qualitative_claim: The highest-quality reversal is exhaustion after absorbed aggression at a meaningful edge.
bullish_rule: After bearish effort is absorbed near support, require edge exhaustion or very weak low-volume retest; long on upward trigger.
bearish_rule: After bullish effort is absorbed near resistance, require edge exhaustion or very weak high-volume failure; short on downward trigger.
required_data: OHLCV; footprint; delta; bid/ask volume; levels
feature_columns_needed: absorption_score; effort_result_score; delta_contradiction; exhaustion_flag; level_score; trigger_state; stop_distance_ticks
candidate_thresholds: No hard absorption threshold; require combined absorption_score plus exhaustion/location score. Test A+ cutoffs 75/82/90.
confirmation_rule: Signal bar closes; price moves away from absorbed/exhaustion zone within configured trigger window.
invalidation_rule: Price accepts through absorbed zone; fresh initiative expands through edge.
expected_edge: Very strong: combines trader's favorite exhaustion-after-absorption idea with tight stop.

qualitative_claim: Aggressive delta is not control if price does not progress; passive absorption can reverse price.
bullish_rule: At support/low, negative delta or sell aggression with green/off-low close and poor downside progress; long on rotation above signal/retest.
bearish_rule: At resistance/high, positive delta or buy aggression with red/off-high close and poor upside progress; short on rotation below signal/retest.
required_data: OHLCV; delta; bid/ask volume; footprint; levels
feature_columns_needed: bar_delta; delta_percentile; close_location_value; price_progress_per_delta; defended_price_volume; level_score
candidate_thresholds: Use delta percentile and price-progress-per-delta score; no absolute contract threshold.
confirmation_rule: Rotation away from defended price; optional retest failure.
invalidation_rule: Continuation through defended price with expanding delta.
expected_edge: Strong when level is clear and effort/result mismatch is large.

qualitative_claim: Strong positive delta at highs is bearish when it is absorbed and fails to continue.

bearish_rule: At HOD/resistance/swing high, positive_delta_percentile high but continuation_mfe poor; short after red/rejection bar or loss of signal low.
feature_columns_needed: positive_delta_percentile; high_location_score; continuation_mfe_ticks; close_location_value; next_bar_delta; rejection_trigger
candidate_thresholds: Research default: delta percentile >=80/90 and continuation <= small tick threshold; optimize by instrument.
confirmation_rule: No continuation beyond high plus rejection/negative response.
invalidation_rule: Price accepts above high and positive delta continues.
expected_edge: Strong if at resistance/HOD with immediate failure.

qualitative_claim: Negative delta at lows is bullish only when selling is absorbed and price holds.

bearish_rule: Mirror: positive delta at high with rejection is handled in VH004.

qualitative_claim: A retest/new extreme with weaker delta has edge only at a level and after price confirms.
bullish_rule: Lower low/retest low with less negative delta than prior push; long only after reclaim/rejection or exhaustion.
bearish_rule: Higher high/retest high with less positive delta than prior push; short only after rejection or exhaustion.
required_data: OHLCV; bar delta; cumulative delta; max/min delta; levels
feature_columns_needed: prior_extreme_delta; current_extreme_delta; delta_slope; cum_delta_divergence; retest_distance_ticks; confirmation_state
candidate_thresholds: Use normalized delta difference over prior 3-5 directional pushes; avoid fixed contracts.
confirmation_rule: Reclaim/rejection, reversal close, or exhaustion at retest.
invalidation_rule: Delta re-accelerates and price extends through level.
expected_edge: Medium-high: best as confluence, not standalone.

qualitative_claim: Breakout/sweep edge reversals require reclaim, not just a wick.
bullish_rule: Break below support/LOD/value then close back above within reclaim window; long on reclaim hold.
bearish_rule: Break above resistance/HOD/value then close back below within reclaim window; short on rejection hold.

candidate_thresholds: Research defaults: reclaim_window=1-3 bars; break_distance >=1 tick; test by timeframe.
confirmation_rule: Close back inside level plus next bar holds/moves away.
invalidation_rule: Retest outside level holds; acceptance beyond level; trend-day continuation.
expected_edge: Strong for clean levels; weak for random wicks.

qualitative_claim: A stop run is only tradable when sweep volume fails and the level is reclaimed.
bullish_rule: Sweep below prior low with volume/delta spike, then reclaim prior low; long after reclaim.
bearish_rule: Sweep above prior high with volume/delta spike, then reject below prior high; short after rejection.

candidate_thresholds: Research defaults: volume percentile >=90, reclaim <=3 bars; treat as crude.
confirmation_rule: Reclaim/rejection of swept level and no continuation in sweep direction.
invalidation_rule: Level flips and holds in sweep direction; fresh stacked imbalances continue.
expected_edge: Medium: useful but noisy and under-sampled.

qualitative_claim: Trapped traders are identified by late aggression plus no continuation, not by size alone.

bearish_rule: Late buyers lift highs and fail; price reverses through their likely entry zone; short.

candidate_thresholds: No fixed threshold; use aggression percentile plus no-continuation score.
confirmation_rule: Price trades through trap zone against aggressive side.
invalidation_rule: Aggressive side continues and accepts beyond edge.
expected_edge: Medium-high discretionary edge; lower automation confidence.

bearish_rule: Strong buy bar/stack fails to continue higher near resistance; short after loss of trigger zone.

bearish_rule: Buy imbalances/stack at resistance fail to continue and price loses imbalance zone; short.

candidate_thresholds: Candidate: stack_count>=3 and ratio configurable; test clustered imbalances too.

invalidation_rule: Clean continuation in imbalance direction or retest holds.

qualitative_claim: Reversal signals need regime-aware scoring; trend continuation context should cap countertrend fades.

bearish_rule: Allow short reversals at range highs/resistance or explicit failed breakout; cap shorts in intact upside trend.

candidate_thresholds: No hard universal threshold; use cap rules and score penalties.
confirmation_rule: Context agrees with reversal or failed acceptance explicitly overrides trend.
invalidation_rule: Trend acceptance remains intact and signal is only countertrend fade.
expected_edge: Reduces false positives; not a primary edge.
